# Druzkowski cubic-linear counterexample F(X) = X - (A X)^{*3} on C^426
# N = r0 + nA = 347 + 79 = 426;  X = (p_1..p_347, q_1..q_79)
# A = [[D0*B0, D0],[0,0]];  F(p,q) = (p - (D0(B0 p + q))^{*3}, q)
# i.e. F_k = X_k + (l_k(X))^3, l_k = -(row k of [D0B0 | D0]), l_k = 0 for k > r0.
# Rows of D0 (the r0 = 347 linear forms in the 79 Stage-A variables),
# sparse format 'var_index:coeff':

D0[0] = 15:1 16:1 78:1
D0[1] = 15:1 16:-1 78:-1
D0[2] = 15:1 16:1 78:-1
